title: atalantia griffithii
intro: Atalantia griffithii, also known as the Indian plum or orange berry, is a species of evergreen shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Atalantia griffithii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing protection against various diseases due to its rich content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The herbal preparations of Atalantia griffithii include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to create various medicinal products, such as capsules, tablets, and topical creams.
